titleStmt.title: SII 41.463: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 463. (A.R. No. 677 of 1905.) Tiruvēḍagam, Nilakkōṭṭai Taluk, Madura District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Patrikāparamēśvara temple at Tiruvēḍagam.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Krishnadēvarāya, Śaka 1447, Vyaya, Dakshiṇāyanam, Varsha ritu, Pūrva, Guruvāra, Pūra = 1526 A.D.

summary.p: Built in at the end. Gift of a village (name lost) in Teṉkallaka-nāḍu by pachchai-Perumal Pachchai Kaṇḍiyadēvar with the approval of Chinnappa-Nayaka, to the temple of Tiruvēḍakam as kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadāna. The fixed tax rates to be paid to the temple by the donor are mentioned = 5 paṇam on every mā of land cutivating banana and sugarcane, and three-fourths of this rate for the kōḍai-kuṟuvai crops.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīkṛṣṇadeva mahārāyarpirutivirācciyampaṇṇiyaru
śakābtam 1000 4 100 4 10 8 yitaṉmel cellā niṉṟa vyaya samvatu sarattu dakṣiṇāyanam varṣa ṛtu pūrvvapakṣa
guruvāramum pūranakṣatramu siddhayogamum bavakaraṇamum peṟṟaṉāḷ svāmi kraṣṇadeva mahārāyaṟkudharmmamāka
madhuraimaṇṭalam tiruvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷukiṟa nāḷaiyile pākaṉuṟ kūṟṟattu coḻakulāntaka
paccaipperumāḷ paccaikaṇṭiyatevar ciṉṉappanāyakkaṟku viṇṇappañ ceytuteṉkallakaṉāṭṭu cirmaiyil Emmaṇṭa
nallūrai taṉakku kārāṇmai kāṇiyāṭciyāka niccittuk koṇṭa nayiṉā*r tiruruveṭakamuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku kuṭinīṅkāttevatāṉa
cirmai Uṇṭāṉatu Eppeṟpaṭṭatuvum tiricūlattāpanam paṇṇikkuṭutta Ū kuṟicciyāṉa kumāttālyi
puñcaikkum pala[ svaṉndra] dāyattukkum palakuṭiyaḷ vilai yilaiyāṅkaṭṭuk kuttakai Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku
vāḻai karumpukku māttāl paṇam Añcu Ākavum koṭaikkuṟuvaikku varucai Oṉṟu mukkālākavum ca
pravecame Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum § yintaūr tevatāṉamākap paṇṇit tarukaiyilyi
kku kārāṇmaikāṇiyāṭciyākat tiruveṭakattil viṭṭa maṉai Oṉṟu Oṉpatāṅ kaṇṇāttil
nellu mukkalamum paṇam Oṉṟum koṭaikku Oṉṟu mukkālum Āka yintak kalveṭṭuppaṭiye kālat
paṟṟikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaraiyum cantatippiravecame Aṉupavittu koḷḷavum § tiruveṭakaācāri kuṟu
yinta tevatānam Emmaṇṭalaṅ koṇṭāṉukkum yivaṉ kāṇiyāṭcikkum Ahitam coṉṉavaṉ
kaṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile poka kaṭavāṉākavum§ svāmi ciṉṉappaṉāyakkar
tampiṇaippaṭikku koyil Atikāram somarasar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.463 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
